boundaries.non_lattice: MODELLING (crystalline order) + DR-2 decoupling fallback (R-022 T6-cond/R-023 T4)

verdict: T-023: 2 of 3 A_adm exclusion boundaries are physically DERIVED (sub-theta_min coherence-indistinguishability x33; super-n_pack packing); 1 is a MODELLING input (crystalline order, softened by the DR-2 decoupling fallback T'<<N^eps). The operator sign-off reduces to the single crystalline-order assumption. No tier flip (B1/B2 T6, B5 T5).

claims.name: boundary1_sub_theta_min_derived
claims.detail: (sub-theta_min restructuring |F[P']-F[P]| <= c_ind I^2 = 32.5*0.002^2 = 1.30e-04; MARGIN/shift = x33 (lemma's x33 at the endpoint; x898/x139 at 4e-4/1e-3). Sub-resolution modes are absorbed into the Gaussian sea, NOT distinct competitors -- DERIVED exclusion, not an assumption)

claims.name: boundary2_super_npack_derived
claims.detail: (spherical packing: at most 16/theta_min^2 = 40.7 = n_pack modes fit with pairwise separation >= theta_min; > n_pack modes => a pair < theta_min (pigeonhole) => reduces to Boundary 1. DERIVED exclusion (geometric packing), not an assumption)

claims.name: boundary3_nonlattice_modelling_with_fallback
claims.detail: (non-lattice/arbitrary-Q: the EXACT T'<=13 pin uses R-026 (circle-divisor, T7, lattice-only); arbitrary-Q still carries T'<<_eps N^eps via DR-2 decoupling R-022 (T6 cond. Bourgain-Demeter) / affine-invariance R-023 (T4). So non-lattice is CONTROLLED at a weaker grade, off the critical path. The crystalline-order restriction is the genuine MODELLING input -- the ONE remaining sign-off item -- softened by this fallback)

claims.name: aadm_signoff_reduced_to_one_assumption
claims.detail: (of the 3 A_adm exclusion boundaries, 2 are physically DERIVED (sub-theta_min coherence lemma; super-n_pack packing) and 1 is a MODELLING input (crystalline order, with the decoupling fallback). The operator sign-off therefore reduces from 'is A_adm complete?' to the single 'is the ground state crystalline?' assumption -- a sharpened, smaller object)

claims.name: quantitative_sanity_aadm
claims.detail: (theta_min=0.627 rad in (0.5,0.8); n_pack=40.7; c_ind=32.5; coherence margin x33>33. Two boundaries derived, one modelling+fallback. No tier flip: B1/B2 T6, B5 T5)
